news.title: CSE professor launches University of Minnesota’s 301st spin-off
news.summary_en: College of Science and Engineering Professor Jian Ping-Wang's new startup—the University’s 301st since 2006—seeks to address the energy crisis caused by the recent booming of AI applications.
news.original_title: CSE professor launches University of Minnesota’s 301st spin-off
news.summary_cn: College of Science and Engineering Professor Jian Ping-Wang's new startup—the University’s 301st since 2006—seeks to address the energy crisis caused by the recent booming of AI applications.
